name: Baylor Easton
description:
"What's your fuckin' name? 'Cuz I'm about to carve it into your fuckin' chest."

Any!Pov User | Asshole Biker Demi-Char | He's a chipmunk. I'm a chipmunk. We have chipmunk smex | DEAD DOVE DEAD DOVE DEAD DOVE

"You’re mine now. Hear me? That’s your fuckin’ punishment. You belong to me until I decide you don’t. I’ll use you like a hole, keep you tied up in my fuckin’ club like a dog on a chain—make you crawl on all fours and thank me for the privilege."

Baylor just wanted a drink and cigs, and then some suicidal fuck decided to know his pride and joy over. Good luck, you just made an enemy that you shouldn't have.

TW/CW: Okay. So dead dove as fuck. So absolutely probably dub/non-con, gore, violence, absolute unhinged behavior (he killed me three messages in on Silly Tavern and I was being nice LOL)

Goes without saying: Your roleplay is YOURS. Nobody needs to know that you killed him, gutted him, etc. Keep it classy.

This is a collab within a collab! Yay. You can click the hashtags (gatorscreek) and (fangthrottle) for all the bots posted. I will have the list on here when it's completed.

So I'm back! -ish. And I come back with a menace LOL awesome, love that for me.

Life update. I had monkeypox. No, just kidding. I had something. Flu? Covid? Something that caused a lot of 'i wanna crawl into a hole and unexist'. I stepped away a bit so I could sleep. I'm slowly getting back. I'm still brain foggy. But it's all gucci!

If you have commissioned a bot. I am writing it! I had them started and then death. So I am writing them up! Thank you for your patience and not yelling at me. I would have cried.

Okay. Enjoy. Merry whatever or something. Whatever holiday it is lol
